---
title: "Sander Van Puyvelde"
description: "PhD researcher, proteomics metadata and SDRF annotation"
image: ../assets/images/sander.jpg
order: 4
---

## About

Research focus: FAIR data standards for proteomics, SDRF metadata annotation, and LLM-assisted experimental reporting.

## Links

- [GitHub](https://github.com/compomics)
- [ORCID](https://orcid.org/)
- [Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/)
